title: bulbophyllum scaberulum var. scaberulum
intro: Bulbophyllum scaberulum var. scaberulum, also known as the rough-lipped orchid, is a type of orchid species that belongs to the Bulbophyllum genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum scaberulum var. scaberulum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
